name: Buff Dealer
advancements: Increase the damage reduction effect to 20% while in defensive form.
Increase the damage boost effect to 11% while in offensive form.
Reduce the trigger interval for blocking lethal damage to once every 120 seconds.
Increase Altered Resistance by 2%, even if not deployed. Unavailable in Apex League.
Increase the damage boost effect to 16% while in offensive form.
